issues.title: Incorrect table reference
issues.problem: The query references a 'students' table which does not exist in the provided schema.

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining its purpose or logic.
issues.fix:
-- Select top 5 merchant names
SELECT merchant_name FROM sigma_analytics.dim_merchant LIMIT 5;

review.corrected_sql:
-- Select top 5 merchant names
SELECT merchant_name FROM sigma_analytics.dim_merchant ORDER BY merchant_name LIMIT 5;
review.summary: The query had a critical correctness issue by referencing a non-existent table and lacked readability due to missing comments.
